title: graphorkis rufa
intro: Graphorkis rufa, also known as the Red Lip Orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the tropical forests of Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. Graphorkis rufa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to harness its medicinal properties.
